## Types of Changes

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Game content (new items, abilities, lore, etc.)
- [ ] Build/CI improvements

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->

- [ ] I have tested this change locally
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] I have added new tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] Game runs without crashes with these changes

## Checklist

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the schema.json file if I added new data structures
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked that my changes don't introduce any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have tested the game functionality affected by my changes
